user.title: Connect to your Teltonika router
user.description: Enter the connection details for your Teltonika router. It must be reachable from Home Assistant.

data_description.host: e.g. 192.168.1.1 — http:// is added automatically if omitted
data_description.modem: Usually '1-1' for single-modem devices like the RUTX11. To confirm, SSH in and run: cat /etc/board.json | jsonfilter -e '@.modems[0].id'
data_description.verify_ssl: Leave off for most routers — they use self-signed certificates

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the router. Check the IP address and that the router is reachable from Home Assistant.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check the Home Assistant logs (search for 'teltonika').

data.action: What would you like to do?

test_sms.title: Send a test SMS
test_sms.description: Send a test message immediately using your configured router.

reconfigure.title: Update router settings
reconfigure.description: Update your router connection details. Current values are pre-filled.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the router. Check the IP address.
error.unknown: Unexpected error — check the Home Assistant logs.
